Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport

Class TlsTransport

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.AbstractTransport
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.AbstractStreamTransport
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport.TlsTransport
All Implemented Interfaces:
Transport, AutoCloseable
public final class TlsTransport extends AbstractStreamTransport
TLS + optional mTLS implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher.

Same 2-byte little-endian stream framing as TcpTransport — TLS is just an encrypted, authenticated pipe under the same wire protocol. All the reader-thread, write-lock, and idempotent-close behaviour comes from AbstractStreamTransport; this class only supplies the socket via openSocket().

Handshake behaviour:

  • The plain socket connect timeout comes from setConnectTimeoutMs(int) (default 10 s).
  • The TLS handshake timeout comes from TlsConfig.handshakeTimeoutMs() (default 15 s). It is applied via a temporary setSoTimeout around SSLSocket.startHandshake() then cleared, so blocking read() calls in the reader thread do not time out on quiet-server keep-alive intervals.
  • Hostname verification is on by default. Disable via TlsConfig.Builder.verifyHostname(boolean) only for pinned-cert scenarios — document the risk.
  • Client certificate presentation (mTLS) is opt-in via TlsConfig.Builder.keyStore(java.nio.file.Path, char[], char[]).

ALPN is not set. Zenoh 1.x over TLS is a raw framed stream, not HTTP/2 or anything else that negotiates a protocol at the ALPN layer, so leaving it unset is correct.

  • Constructor Details

  • Method Details

    • setConnectTimeoutMs

      public TlsTransport setConnectTimeoutMs(int ms)
      Set the plain-socket connect timeout in ms. Must be called before AbstractTransport.connect().

    • setTcpNoDelay

      public TlsTransport setTcpNoDelay(boolean on)
      Enable / disable Nagle. Default: true (Nagle disabled). Must be called before AbstractTransport.connect().

    • openSocket

      protected Socket openSocket() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: AbstractStreamTransport
      Open the underlying stream socket. Called exactly once from AbstractStreamTransport.doConnect(). Implementations are responsible for connect timeout, TCP tunables, TLS handshake, and any other transport-specific setup. Must return a fully connected socket.
      Specified by:
      openSocket in class AbstractStreamTransport
      Throws:
      IOException

    • readerThreadTag

      protected String readerThreadTag()
      Description copied from class: AbstractStreamTransport
      Reader-thread name suffix; typically the endpoint (e.g. "tcp-127.0.0.1:7447").
      Specified by:
      readerThreadTag in class AbstractStreamTransport

    • describe

      public String describe()
      Description copied from interface: Transport
      Human-readable description of the peer endpoint, e.g. "tcp/10.0.0.1:7447".
